top_signals.title: Israel and Iran halt counterstrikes
top_signals.summary: Donald Trump urges both sides to ‘stop shooting’ as he pursues ceasefire extension
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dollar Is Best Bet in New Global Regime of High Rates, BMO Says
top_signals.summary: Betting on continued US dollar strength is the cleanest way for foreign-exchange traders to take a position on a new regime of higher rates and inflation, according to BMO Capital Markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Germany and France drop joint fighter jet project
top_signals.summary: Failure to reach an agreement underscores the struggles Europe has faced in rebuilding its military capacity after decades of underinvestment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chip Stocks Poised for Best Day in Year After Rout: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid renewed enthusiasm over artificial intelligence and bets that a solid economy will keep powering Corporate America.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
